summary: Small decomp-matching adjustments across 16 source files, mostly declaration ordering, PAD_STACK sizing, inserted `(void)` reads, and split arithmetic assignments. The bot report says the PR improved matched code by +3072 bytes and produced 5 new matched functions.

key_files.role: Changed PAD_STACK in ftCo_800AF78C from 8 to 12.
Moved UNUSED pad declaration after Vec3 scale in ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B2FC.
Reordered locals in fn_8017F47C; bot reported this function reached 100%.
Split dz subtraction into assignment plus compound subtraction in grKongo_801D6668; bot reported this function reached 100%.
Reordered locals and inserted `(void) jobj` in Ground_801C20E0, Ground_801C36F4, and Ground_801C466C.
Inserted `(void) attr` after article special-attribute loads in two hookshot functions.
Inserted `(void) fp` in fn_802B8384; bot reported this function reached 100%.
Reordered locals, changed initialization expression shape, and inserted `(void) counts` in item spawn code.
Hoisted dz2 declaration, assigned separately, and inserted `(void) dz2` in lbBgFlash_80020E38.
Inserted `(void)` reads after copied Vec3/scalar assignments in three collision functions.
Reordered HSD_JObj* panel declaration in fn_8024ECCC.
Inserted `(void) y_offset` before subtracting base in mnDiagram_80241E78.
Moved local declaration, changed PAD_STACK from 80 to 64, and inserted `(void) menu_data` in fn_8024AED0.
Split delta_y computation and inserted `(void) delta_y`; bot reported mnStageSw_802359C8 reached 100%.
Inserted `(void) data2` in un_8030715C; bot reported this function reached 100%.

what_changed: Changed 16 files with 33 added and 17 deleted lines according to PR metadata.
Adjusted PAD_STACK sizes in ftCo_800AF78C and fn_8024AED0.

Reordered local variable declarations in multiple functions, including ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010B2FC, fn_8016CFE0, fn_8017F47C, Ground_801C20E0, Ground_801C36F4, Ground_801C466C, fn_8024ECCC, and fn_8024AED0.
Inserted explicit `(void)` uses after otherwise meaningful-looking assignments in ground, item, library, menu, and toy functions.
Split selected arithmetic expressions into multiple statements, including dz subtraction in grKongo_801D6668 and delta_y/y_offset-style computations in menu code.
Bot report recorded 5 newly matched functions: grKongo_801D6668, un_8030715C, fn_8017F47C, fn_802B8384, and mnStageSw_802359C8.
Bot report recorded 17 additional improvements in unmatched items.

smart_moves.text: Kept changes narrow and localized to small codegen-sensitive edits rather than broad rewrites.
Used bot-reported match deltas to demonstrate improvement across many small hunks.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Local declaration order can affect matching in near-matched functions; this PR used declaration reordering in several files and the bot reported multiple score improvements.
Splitting a compound expression into an assignment plus a later operation can improve codegen shape in specific arithmetic cases.
Inserted `(void)` reads were used as narrow codegen/liveness steering in several functions and correspond with bot-reported improvements, but the PR does not explain the underlying compiler behavior.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Active standards require explicit verifier evidence for retained PAD_STACK-style tactics; this PR has bot score evidence but no detailed objdiff excerpts.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order changes to influence stack/register allocation.
examples: fn_8017F47C moved mask and val before other locals
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Useful search target for curator, but not enough evidence to promote as preferred style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inserted `(void)` uses after assignments to preserve or perturb liveness/codegen.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is a matching tactic, not a naming or source-style convention.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove or justify `(void)` codegen steering in the same functions.
Search for retained PAD_STACK changes in ftCo_800AF78C and fn_8024AED0 with objdiff evidence.
Search for review discussion on declaration-order steering versus authored source style.
Check whether any of the five newly matched functions later received cleanup after reaching 100%.

notes: Diff and changed-file metadata are complete for the slice.
PR body is brief and only says the changes improve source matches.
No review comments are present in the slice.
Bot report provides match-percentage evidence, including 5 new matches and 17 unmatched-item improvements.
No assembly listings, objdiff hunks, author rationale, or reviewer explanations are included, so compiler-tactic lessons should remain PR-local and not become global standards without curator review.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2758 used small codegen-sensitive edits to improve several near-matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: Across 16 files, PR 2758 changed PAD_STACK sizes, local declaration order, `(void)` reads, and split arithmetic statements. The bot report recorded +3072 matched bytes, 5 new 100% functions, and 17 additional improvements.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify treatment of `(void)` reads used as liveness/codegen steering
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2758 repeatedly inserts `(void)` uses after assigned locals and bot evidence reports match improvements. Curator may consider documenting that these are matching tactics requiring narrow verifier evidence, similar to PAD_STACK and dummy locals, rather than ordinary source style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Current standards cover PAD_STACK, declaration order, widened lifetimes, dummy locals, and volatile locals, but do not explicitly mention `(void)` reads used to perturb codegen.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat declaration-order-only changes as evidence-required codegen tactics
source_update_candidates.text: This PR contains several declaration-order-only edits with bot-reported score improvements. Curator may consider whether the matching-tactics standard should explicitly list declaration order changes as requiring objdiff/build evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standard already references declaration order changes, and this PR is supporting historical evidence rather than a new accepted rule.

rejection_notes: Do not promote `(void)` insertion as preferred source style; evidence only shows PR-local matching improvement.
Do not infer reviewer approval or intended source style from merge status alone; there are no review comments in the slice.
Do not promote PAD_STACK tuning as broadly acceptable without function-specific verifier evidence.
